response.global_analysis: The video segment consists of dialogue between three VTubers: Kobo Kanaeru, Vestia Zeta, and Kaela Kovalskia. There is no vocal singing in this part. The audio is in Indonesian, and I have transcribed it into the 'og' field and translated it into English for the 'en' field. I used the burnt-in Japanese subtitles as a secondary guide to confirm the content and intent of the Indonesian speech. Timestamps are strictly synchronized with the spoken audio.

subtitles.original: Ya ampun, asik banget ya, iya nggak sih? Iya nggak sih?
subtitles.english: Oh my god, it's so fun, right? Don't you think?

subtitles.original: Parah sih!
subtitles.english: It's crazy!

subtitles.original: Adrenalinnya berasa kan ya? Pengen lari aku rasanya nih!
subtitles.english: You can feel the adrenaline, right? I feel like running!

subtitles.original: Woi woi woi woi woi! Mau ke mana?
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey! Where are you going?

subtitles.original: Iya iya iya stop stop stop stop stop stop stop!
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop!

subtitles.original: Nanti keringetan lho! Nanti keringetan!
subtitles.english: You'll get all sweaty! You'll get sweaty!

subtitles.original: Ah, kalau Kaela gimana?
subtitles.english: Ah, what about you, Kaela?

subtitles.original: Aduh, seru banget. Aku nggak nyangka sih, sampai aku bisa ada di sini ya.
subtitles.english: Wow, it's so much fun. I never expected that I could be standing here.

subtitles.original: Tapi ini ngomong-ngomong, konsernya masih panjang banget, jadi kalian tetep semangat ya sampai akhir!
subtitles.english: But by the way, the concert is still very long, so keep your spirit up until the end!

subtitles.original: Semangat semangat semangat semangat semangat!
subtitles.english: Let's go, let's go, let's go, let's go, let's go!

subtitles.original: Eh tapi ngomongin konser dari tadi, emang pada tahu judul konsernya apa?
subtitles.english: But speaking of the concert, do you guys know what the title is?

subtitles.original: Judul konser kita kali ini adalah 'Chromatic Future'!
subtitles.english: The title of our concert this time is 'Chromatic Future'!

subtitles.original: Ada yang tahu nggak artinya apa? Ayo absen!
subtitles.english: Does anyone know what it means? Let's check!

subtitles.original: Nah, ini, Kobo paling tahu.
subtitles.english: Now, this, Kobo knows best.

subtitles.original: Heh? Ah...
subtitles.english: Huh? Ah...

subtitles.original: Yang jelasin yang paling tinggi, yuk let's go!
subtitles.english: The tallest one should explain, let's go!

subtitles.original: Segitu ya... ya sudahlah... ya sudahlah...
subtitles.english: Is that how it is? Well, fine... fine...

subtitles.original: Nih ya guys ya buat kalian yang belum tahu, 'Chromatic Future' itu artinya tuh masa depan yang berwarna-warni.
subtitles.english: So guys, for those who don't know, 'Chromatic Future' means a colorful future.

subtitles.original: Jadi karena Hololive Indonesia kan udah 5 tahun nih...
subtitles.english: Since Hololive Indonesia has been around for 5 years now...

subtitles.original: Kita sama-sama dari hari satu sampai sekarang...
subtitles.english: We've been walking together from day one until now...

subtitles.original: Nah jadi itu untuk ke depannya kita tuh juga harapannya tuh kita bisa nyiptain waktu...
subtitles.english: So for the future, our hope is that we can create time...

subtitles.original: ...dan memori yang berwarna-warni...
subtitles.english: ...and colorful memories...

subtitles.original: ...sama seluruh fans dari Hololive Indonesia!
subtitles.english: ...together with all the fans of Hololive Indonesia!

subtitles.original: Ya gitu, betul Kaela Kovalskia! Catat, catat!
subtitles.english: That's right, Kaela Kovalskia is correct! Take notes!

subtitles.original: Iya iya iya...
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes...

subtitles.original: Nah, kalian sekarang udah pada tahu kan karena tadi udah dijelasin sama Kaela.
subtitles.english: Now you all know, since Kaela just explained it.

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu, konsernya kan udah mulai nih...
subtitles.english: Since the concert has already started...

subtitles.original: Kalian mau nge-post soal konser ini di medsos...
subtitles.english: ...when you post about this concert on social media...

subtitles.original: ...jangan lupa hashtag #holoIDChromaticFuture ya!
subtitles.english: ...don't forget the hashtag #holoIDChromaticFuture!

subtitles.original: Karena kita pengen banget lihat kalian tuh... apa sih...
subtitles.english: Because we really want to see your... what is it...

subtitles.original: ...pengen lihat semangat kalian!
subtitles.english: ...we want to see your passion!

subtitles.original: Ya itu betul banget, iya nggak?
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's absolutely right!

subtitles.original: Jangan typo, jangan typo!
subtitles.english: No typos, no typos!

subtitles.original: Asik, share ke semua, oke?
subtitles.english: Nice, share it with everyone, okay?

subtitles.original: Jadi tapi jujur deh, kalian tuh pas dibilang kita bakal konser lho di Indonesia, kalian pada kaget nggak sih?
subtitles.english: But honestly, when you were told we'd have a concert in Indonesia, were you guys surprised?

subtitles.original: Halo, ada yang dengerin?
subtitles.english: Hello, is anyone listening?

subtitles.original: Ayo ayo...
subtitles.english: Come on, come on...

subtitles.original: Betul, aku setuju juga.
subtitles.english: That's right, I agree too.

subtitles.original: Aku merasakan empati terhadap ini adik saya Zeta.
subtitles.english: I feel empathy for my little sister Zeta here.

subtitles.original: Empati iya iya...
subtitles.english: Empathy, yes, yes...

subtitles.original: Kalau Kaela gimana, Kaela Kovalskia?
subtitles.english: What about you, Kaela Kovalskia?

subtitles.original: Aku juga waktu itu nggak nyangka banget kayak 'hah, beneran nih? Real nih?' gitu kan.
subtitles.english: I also didn't expect it at all, like 'huh, for real? Is this real?'

subtitles.original: Kayak 'lho, bisa gitu? Akhirnya... mana udah bersembilan di Indonesia pula ya kan?'
subtitles.english: Like 'wow, it's finally happening... and all nine of us in Indonesia too, right?'

subtitles.original: Keren banget! Keren banget!
subtitles.english: It's so cool! It's so cool!

subtitles.original: Ini kan konser pertama Hololive Indonesia yang bersembilan.
subtitles.english: This is the first Hololive Indonesia concert with all nine members.

subtitles.original: Sebenarnya tuh nggak hanya ini tuh momen terbesar dan terpenting juga untuk fans Hololive Indonesia...
subtitles.english: Actually, it's not just the biggest and most important moment for Hololive Indonesia fans...

subtitles.original: ...tapi seluruh dunia juga pasti bakal nonton nggak sih?
subtitles.english: ...but everyone around the world must be watching, right?

subtitles.original: Iya nggak?
subtitles.english: Right?

subtitles.original: Iya, jawab!
subtitles.english: Yes, answer me!

subtitles.original: Iya iya makasih, makasih semuanya...
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, thank you, thank you everyone...

subtitles.original: ...tapi tentu saja ini pencapaiannya nggak bakal cuma sampai di sini aja kan?
subtitles.english: ...but of course, this achievement won't just stop here, right?

subtitles.original: Jadi next-nya mungkin kita bisa apa ya... dominating the world gitu.
subtitles.english: So next, maybe we can... like, dominate the world.

subtitles.original: We are ready, we ready ready!
subtitles.english: We are ready, we're ready, ready!

subtitles.original: Ready ready ready! Betul banget Kaela, Zeta!
subtitles.english: Ready, ready, ready! You're absolutely right, Kaela and Zeta!

subtitles.original: Selain dari dukungan fans in this opportunity, kita juga mau mengucapkan terima kasih...
subtitles.english: In addition to the fans' support on this opportunity, we also want to say thank you...

subtitles.original: ...untuk semua sponsor yang mendukung terjadinya konser ini. Terima kasih!
subtitles.english: ...to all the sponsors who supported the realization of this concert. Thank you!

subtitles.original: Terima kasih! Makasih makasih makasih semuanya! Thank you thank you thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you, thank you, thank you everyone! Thank you, thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: Eh tapi ngomong-ngomong di konser ini kayaknya ada yang beda nggak sih?
subtitles.english: By the way, doesn't something feel different about this concert?

subtitles.original: Ela, kamu nyadar nggak? Soalnya kamu paling peka nggak sih?
subtitles.english: Ela, did you notice? You're the most observant one, right?

subtitles.original: Wits... ya sadarlah, kalau Kobo mah nggak bakal sadar.
subtitles.english: Wits... of course I did. Kobo wouldn't even notice.

subtitles.original: Nih nih nih nih yang beda tuh kali ini tuh model kita...
subtitles.english: Look, look, look, look. What's different this time is our models...

subtitles.original: Ini model baru nih!
subtitles.english: These are new models!

subtitles.original: Gemes banget! Lucu lucu!
subtitles.english: So adorable! So cute!

subtitles.original: Wiii! Lucu lucu lucu lucu lucu!
subtitles.english: Wheee! So cute, cute, cute, cute, cute!

subtitles.original: Kameranya dekatin ke aku! Kameranya dekatin ke aku!
subtitles.english: Bring the camera closer to me! Bring the camera closer to me!

subtitles.original: Nih nih nih nih kalian mau lihat keimutan Kobo nih nih...
subtitles.english: Look, look, look, look! You guys want to see Kobo's cuteness? Here, here...

subtitles.original: Oshiri!
subtitles.english: Butt!

subtitles.original: Eh eh eh eh...
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey, hey...

subtitles.original: Wait wait wait wait, ini kamera diambil Kobo semua nggak sih? Ini ke aku aku juga aku juga!
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, wait, wait, Kobo is hogging all the cameras, right? Here, to me too, me too!

subtitles.original: Jangan Kobo doang!
subtitles.english: Not just Kobo!

subtitles.original: Sini sini sini sini kamera kamera kamera Kobo lagi!
subtitles.english: Here, here, here, here, camera, camera, camera! Kobo's turn again!

subtitles.original: Stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop stop! Mulai mulai mulai semua kamera diambil!
subtitles.english: Stop, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop! She's starting again, taking all the cameras!

subtitles.original: Semua kamera diambil!
subtitles.english: She's hogging all the cameras!

subtitles.original: Oke oke oke...
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay...

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu... aduh aduh aduh sampai kehabisan napas... Jangan rebutan di depan konser!
subtitles.english: Alright then... wow, I'm out of breath... Don't fight in front of the concert!

subtitles.original: Iya...
subtitles.english: Okay...

subtitles.original: Iya iya iya...
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes...

subtitles.original: Zeta kalau marah serem lho.
subtitles.english: Zeta is scary when she's angry.
